scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: cd backend && npm run test && cd ../frontend && npm run test
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.format: cd backend && npm run format && cd ../frontend && npm run format
